## Samsung Electronics Begins Mass Production of PCIe 6.0 SSDs Targeting AI Server Deployments

Samsung's PCIe 6.0 SSD mass production confirms AI server storage as a live NAND demand driver today, not a future thesis; positive read-through for the NAND demand cycle and signals Samsung's intent to capture AI infrastructure storage share at the leading edge.

- Samsung Electronics (005930.KS) has commenced mass production of PCIe 6.0 solid-state drives intended for AI server applications.
- PCIe 6.0 represents a next-generation storage interface, signaling Samsung's move to meet high-bandwidth AI workload storage demand.
- Mass production commencement is a concrete supply-ramp milestone, not a product announcement or roadmap disclosure.
- High classifier confidence; directly relevant to AI infrastructure capex, datacenter buildout pacing, and NAND demand cycle themes.
